name: Hazelnut Chunk Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Toast hazelnuts, husks, and coarsely chop; set aside.
3. Lightly butter a 9x13-inch baking pan.
4. Melt 1 cup butter in a heavy large saucepan over low heat.
5. Remove from heat and whisk in sugar, eggs, cocoa, and vanilla extract.
6. Stir in flour and salt.
7. Add chopped chocolate and nuts.
8. Spread batter in the prepared pan.
9. Bake until a tester inserted in the center comes out barely moist but not wet, 25 to 30 minutes.
10. Cool on a rack. (Can be prepared up to 1 day ahead. Wrap tightly.)
11. Cut into 1 1/2-inch squares.
